storyboard.content: I suddenly can't move my right arm at all.
The right side of my face feels droopy and I can't control it.
My speech has gone slurry and I'm having a very hard time finding the words I want to say.
I have a terrible headache that came out of nowhere.
I feel very confused and can't think straight.
Everything started suddenly about 30 minutes ago while I was just sitting watching TV. There was no warning at all.
I'm a 72-year-old man with an irregular heartbeat and I take blood thinners every day.
